commands:
set -e
cd /opt/cloudclean
aws s3 cp s3://cloudclean-deploy-647106553742/frontend.zip frontend.zip --region ap-south-1
rm -rf frontend
mkdir -p frontend
unzip -o frontend.zip -d frontend || true
chown -R ec2-user:ec2-user /opt/cloudclean
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "frontend http: %{http_code}
" http://127.0.0.1/
